# viettelidc_ovpc_launch_template (Data Source)

Read a ViettelIDC Launch Template by its ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_launch_template" "web" {
  name   = "web-template"
  vpc_id = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Launch Template ID.

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID.

### Read-Only

- `cpu_size` (Number) Number of vCPUs.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `memory_size` (Number) Memory size in GB.
- `name` (String) Template name.
- `vm_id` (String) Source VM ID.
